title: Behavior Drop Item For
description: Allows the mob to move near a target and drop an item.

drop_item_chance.description: Chance per tick to drop an item.

entity_types.description: Entity types the entity will drop items for.

goal_radius.description: Distance in blocks at which the entity is considered to have reached the drop location.

loot_table.description: Path to the loot table used to determine the dropped item.

max_dist.description: Maximum distance in blocks at which the entity will offer items.

offering_distance.description: Distance in blocks at which the item is offered.

on_drop_attempt.description: Event to run when the entity attempts to drop an item.

search_height.description: Vertical range to search for the drop location.

search_range.description: Horizontal range to search for the drop location.

speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier while moving to drop the item.

oneOf.description: Range [min, max] of the random time of day (0-1).

time_of_day_range.description: Time of day range during which the entity will drop items.
